narrative: An 8-year experienced NLP Engineer at Dream11, a mixed product and services company, ranked 85th for the Senior AI/ML Engineer role. The primary driver was their verified skill depth. They have a strong JD-relevant skill match, particularly with BM25 and Deep Learning, and also have experience with Qdrant and Haystack. However, their location in Ahmedabad and minor concerns with their profile credibility limited their overall ranking.
